pericopes.pericopeTitle: THE LAMPSTAND, THE ALTARS OFINCENSE AND HOLOCAUSTS,AND THE COURT

entries.author: Pope St. Gregory I
entries.title: THE LAVER OF COMPUNCTION.
entries.body: Moses put there a bronze basin in which the priests had to wash themselves and enter the Holy of Holies, because God’s law prescribes that we first wash ourselves by compunction, that in our uncleanness we may not be unworthy to enter the cleanness of the secrets of God. {fn:0} See also
